name: parhai-platform
description: Parhai.com AI-powered O-Level and A-Level study SaaS.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names frontend,backend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
